seed_problem: Themed grid network; remove at most k links to maximize the increase in s-t shortest path; checker verifies budget + connectivity and scores achieved delay.
mutation: output: change the removable objects from EDGES to NODES -- power down at most k sensor stations (deleting each station and all its incident channels) to maximize the s-t shortest path. Node-deletion (most-vital-nodes) shortest-path interdiction is NP-hard and greedy/local-search strategies diverge differently than in the edge variant.
title: Blinded Wind Tunnel: Sensor-Station Interdiction
strategies: do-nothing baseline: power down no station (achieves the original relay latency)
degree greedy: repeatedly power down the highest-degree interior station on the current fastest route while keeping inlet-sink connectivity
best-improvement local search: at each step re-solve the shortest route after tentatively powering down each candidate station and commit the one that maximizes latency
randomized multi-restart: perturb the best-improvement choices across seeded restarts and keep the station set that maximizes final latency
